prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Shadowrun Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: continent_archipelago. Draw one dominant fictional continent plus a large irregular offshore archipelago as a dark cyberpunk Matrix-overlay atlas. The mainland should include sprawling metropolitan districts, megacorp arcology towers, barrens slums, matrix access node hubs, gang territory borders, smuggling docks, corporate enclaves, awakened forest preserves, mana storm zones, toxic industrial wastelands, dragon-owned towers, and rain-slick neon transit corridors. The archipelago should be uneven and varied: corporate island enclaves, offshore data havens, smuggler ports, abandoned arcologies, awakened spirit preserves, tiny neon reef platforms, broad island sprawl districts, and black-site research islands. Avoid a simple vertical split; make the continent-and-archipelago separation curve in a diagonal / C-shaped neon gulf with twisting straits, bays, polluted shoals, broken coast shelves, and hidden smuggler channels. Coastlines must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, capes, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves, reefs, and shoals. Large detailed atlas, neon cyan/magenta highlights, subtle hexagonal Matrix overlay allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
